commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=eb0c4dfe5b0da9019f5b2a775d7c3c14a37dd716)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Telegram stale spool recovery's final claim-to-pending rename with ENOENT/EEXIST handling and adds a colocated regression test.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +32. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can scan and stat a stale .processing file, then throw ENOENT from the unguarded final fs.rename if a concurrent drain/removal occurs before rename. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer choice between overlapping PRs and contributor-supplied proof that automation cannot provide for the external branch.

target.title: fix(telegram): handle ENOENT race in spool drain recovery rename
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
